parsed.production_notes: The video features a human actor in a real-world setting, but prominently features an AI-generated avatar on a tablet screen. The avatar exhibits typical AI stylization and slightly unnatural lip-sync.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, medium build, fair complexion, blonde hair tied back. She wears glasses.
characters.demeanor: Focused on her task, slightly confused by her mistakes but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Young female avatar, fair complexion, red hair.

scenes.setting: Kitchen, daytime. Cutting board, knife, apple, tablet. Yellow walls, wooden ceiling.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is standing in a kitchen, cutting an apple on a white cutting board with a knife. In the foreground, a tablet is propped up, displaying Character B. The kitchen features yellow walls and a wooden paneled ceiling. Natural light illuminates the scene. Character A looks down at her hands while cutting and occasionally glances towards the tablet.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is multitasking in her kitchen, preparing food while having a conversation with Character B on her tablet. Text overlays appear on screen, displaying the dialogue and highlighting corrections with icons. A banner of flags is visible at the top.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: What are you doing?
Character A says: I am cooking my daughter.
Character B says: What? You are cooking your daughter!?
Character A says: No no, I mean I am making food for my daughter!
Character B says: Oh thank God. Then say: I am cooking for my daughter.
Character A says: I am cooking for my daughter.
Character B says: How old is your daughter?
Character A says: She has 3.
Character B says: Say: She is three years old.
Character A says: She is three years old.
Character A says: I have many work today.
Character B says: Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"?
Character A says: I have a lot of work today.
Character A says: How can I improve my English?
Character B says: By talking to me every day! I'm Skye, an AI tutor on Praktika. I can teach you and correct your English while you're working. 15 minutes daily is all you need!
Character A says: Amazing, let's start!
